title: Design toolbar with tool selection, zoom controls, and undo/redo functionality
purpose: Provides a horizontal toolbar for design editor with tool selection buttons, undo/redo controls, export options, and zoom management.

steps.content: Initialize the design editor store state with active tool, zoom, and scene version.
Set up undo and redo handlers that call the store's undoAction and redoAction methods.
Define zoom in and zoom out handlers that apply zoom changes centered on the window.
Re-evaluate the component on scene version changes to update button states after edits.
Create export PNG handler that renders the current scene to an image and downloads it.
Create copy PNG handler that renders the current scene to an image and copies it to clipboard.
Render the toolbar UI with tool buttons, undo/redo controls, export buttons, and zoom controls.
Call the undoAction method from the design editor store state.
Call the redoAction method from the design editor store state.
Get the current store state.
Calculate the center coordinates of the window.
Apply a positive zoom change centered on the calculated coordinates.
Get the current store state.
Calculate the center coordinates of the window.
Apply a negative zoom change centered on the calculated coordinates.
Get the canvas kit, renderer, and graph from editor references.
IF canvas kit or renderer is not available, return early.
Get the current page ID from the store.
Retrieve the page node from the graph.
IF page is not found or has no children, return early.
Render the page nodes to image data using the specified scale and format.
IF rendering fails, return early.
Create a blob from the image data.
Generate a URL for the blob.
Create a download link element and set its properties.
Trigger the download by clicking the link.
Revoke the object URL to free memory.
Get the canvas kit, renderer, and graph from editor references.
IF canvas kit or renderer is not available, return early.
Get the current page ID from the store.
Retrieve the page node from the graph.
IF page is not found or has no children, return early.
Render the page nodes to image data using the specified scale and format.
IF rendering fails, return early.
Create a blob from the image data.
Write the blob to the clipboard using the clipboard API.
